2010032.Name: Cheer-Up Treat
2010032.Des: Consumption grants a special effect: receive triple clear rewards the next time you complete any Chaotic Realm dungeon. This effect doesn't apply to assist rewards, Bane Lord loot, or clear counts, and remains subject to the weekly Reforge Stone acquisition limit in Chaotic Realm.

2010033.Name: Canned Fish
2010033.Des:
Crafting results in either products Lv.1 or Lv.2 with a 50% chance.
Juicy fish cuts preserved in fine oil, one of Asterleeds' most common and convenient specialties. Grab-and-go goodness for flavor on the fly.

2010034.Name: Grilled Fish
2010034.Des:
Crafting results in either products Lv.1 or Lv.2 with a 50% chance.
Simple dishes offer sublime flavors. Crafted from premium fresh fish, delicately brined and expertly grilled, the resulting fillet delivers an exceptional blend of rich flavor and irresistible aroma.

2010035.Name: Jar Meat
2010035.Des:
Crafting results in either products Lv.1 or Lv.2 with a 50% chance.
Tender and richly seasoned, this travel-ready meat is a staple for adventurers on the go.

2010036.Name: Blossom Dumpling
2010036.Des:
Crafting results in either products Lv.1 or Lv.2 with a 50% chance.
Crafted from fresh meat, these meatballs are delicately rolled in chopped flower petals and adorned with vibrant decorations. Once steamed, they transform into flower-wrapped delights-both flavorful and visually charming.

2010037.Name: Honey Mushroom Soup
2010037.Des:
Crafting results in either products Lv.1 or Lv.2 with a 50% chance.
A warm, comforting soup found on nearly every table in the seaside capital. Its cozy aroma and gentle sweetness are the essence of home.

2010038.Name: Shroom Jelly
2010038.Des:
Crafting results in either products Lv.1 or Lv.2 with a 50% chance.
Mushrooms are transformed into bouncy, jelly-like treats, ideally served as either a light dessert or a wholesome snack.

2010039.Name: Fragrant Fresh Fruit Tea
2010039.Des:
Crafting results in either products Lv.1 or Lv.2 with a 50% chance.
A refreshingly sweet-and-tart fruit drink that lifts your spirits with every sip-as if catching the scent of joy on the breeze.

2010040.Name: Sweet Dew Berry
2010040.Des:
Crafting results in either products Lv.1 or Lv.2 with a 50% chance.
Fresh fruit is glazed in shimmering honey and gently roasted into crystalline sugar spheres, each bite offering a whisper of delicate sweetness.

2010041.Name: Lavafish Stew
2010041.Des:
Crafting yields products Lv.1 and Lv.2 at rates of 80% and 20%, respectively.
Finely minced fish is simmered into a velvety broth, which is then used to slow-cook a rich and savory meat stew. Infused with premium spices, the stew exudes an irresistible aroma said to halt passers-by in their tracks.

2010042.Name: Glazefin Chop
2010042.Des:
Crafting yields products Lv.1 and Lv.2 at rates of 80% and 20%, respectively.
A translucent, jelly-like steak is elegantly glazed with a harmonious blend of fish sauce and golden honey. A must-have for anyone needing a serious energy boost!

2010043.Name: Astelpot Duo
2010043.Des:
Crafting yields products Lv.1 and Lv.2 at rates of 80% and 20%, respectively.
A simplified everyday rendition of the Asterleeds family's cherished feast-enriched with extra mushrooms for deeper umami flavor, streamlined for effortless preparation, and delightfully budget-friendly.

2010044.Name: Astelshroom Pot
2010044.Des:
Crafting yields products Lv.1 and Lv.2 at rates of 80% and 20%, respectively.
Asterleeds Stew is a classic Asterleeds family dish, based on a simple fish stew... but which additional ingredients make it truly authentic remains a never-ending debate. This mushroom Asterleeds Stew features special spices, making it a favorite among Asterians who enjoy bold flavors.

2010045.Name: Veilfruit Stew
2010045.Des:
Crafting yields products Lv.1 and Lv.2 at rates of 80% and 20%, respectively.
Silk-thin slices of fresh fruit and fish-as translucent as chiffon-are gently poached in a rolling broth, creating a delicate umami elixir. This distinctive cooking technique unveils the profound umami essence of the fish, elevating its natural flavor to gourmet perfection.

2010046.Name: Aromafish Can
2010046.Des:
Crafting yields products Lv.1 and Lv.2 at rates of 80% and 20%, respectively.
Asterleeds' signature fish conserva-infused with botanicals and luxuriating in golden, aromatic oil-is a portable, long-lasting delight that satisfies deeply.

2010047.Name: Stuffshroom Puff
2010047.Des:
Crafting yields products Lv.1 and Lv.2 at rates of 80% and 20%, respectively.
Plump, hand-selected mushrooms are hollowed out, stuffed with a savory blend of their own flesh and minced meat, then steamed to perfection-yielding irresistibly plump mushroom delights.

2010048.Name: Buttery Chunks
2010048.Des:
Crafting yields products Lv.1 and Lv.2 at rates of 80% and 20%, respectively.
Hot melted butter unlocks the full spectrum of spices, elevating the already sumptuous nine-flavor braised meat to sublime depths of flavor.

2010049.Name: Charfruit Roast
2010049.Des:
Crafting yields products Lv.1 and Lv.2 at rates of 80% and 20%, respectively.
Juicy fruit nestled within the meat, charcoal-smoked to perfection-as the fat renders down and the flesh tightens, bursting with fruity aroma-yielding a robust, fragrant masterpiece.

2010050.Name: Plainmeat Soup
2010050.Des:
Crafting yields products Lv.1 and Lv.2 at rates of 80% and 20%, respectively.
Voted the number one overnight meal among forest hunters by a popular food magazine. Some disgruntled readers argue it's just popular because it's easy to make, but that doesn't make it any less delicious.

2010051.Name: Simple Asterleeds Pot
2010051.Des:
Crafting yields products Lv.1 and Lv.2 at rates of 80% and 20%, respectively.
Asterleeds' Pot is a classic Asterleeds family dish, based on a simple fish stew... but which additional ingredients make it truly authentic remains a never-ending debate. The Asterleeds rustic pot allows the fish's pure, unadulterated essence to shine- its flavor so evocative, it's said to bring tears to wanderers longing for the taste of home.

2010052.Name: Nine-Flavor Meat
2010052.Des:
Crafting yields products Lv.1 and Lv.2 at rates of 80% and 20%, respectively.
A masterful blend of nine spices gives this preserved meat a bold, addictive flavor. Even if you're not here for the shelf life, you'll stay for the taste.

2010053.Name: Gulu Sauce
2010053.Des:
Crafting yields products Lv.1 and Lv.2 at rates of 80% and 20%, respectively.
Elegantly packed in charming glass jars, this mushroom medley sauce hides tender morsels of chopped fungi. It's special-cooked with honey and butter to soften its earthy flavor, resulting in a velvety texture and nourishing richness. A clever way to sneak in nutrients, even for the most discerning little mushroom-haters.

2010054.Name: Milky Umm
2010054.Des:
Crafting yields products Lv.1 and Lv.2 at rates of 80% and 20%, respectively.
When the sliced Umm Berry is coated with butter and honey, its natural aroma blends with the ingredients, unexpectedly releasing a rich, creamy fragrance!

2010055.Name: Meatfish Skewer
2010055.Des:
Crafting yields products Lv.1, Lv.2, and Lv.3 at rates of 50%, 40%, and 10%, respectively.
Indulge in generous portions of fish and meat, crafted for easy, handheld enjoyment wherever you roam. Legend has it that the first sailor to taste this hearty creation was so overwhelmed with delight, he kept exclaiming "Yummy!"- a joyous moment that inspired the chef to name the dish in its honor.

2010056.Name: Hearty Stewmix
2010056.Des:
Crafting yields products Lv.1, Lv.2, and Lv.3 at rates of 50%, 40%, and 10%, respectively.
An opulent masterpiece born of abundant ingredients and intricate craftsmanship-its vibrant hues, intoxicating aroma, and exquisite flavor merely herald what lies beyond. Revered in countless tales, this legendary dish is best known through the fictional account of a Seal Watcher who, upon sipping a single bowl, was granted supernatural powers.

2010057.Name: Painfly
2010057.Des:
Crafting yields products Lv.1, Lv.2, and Lv.3 at rates of 50%, 40%, and 10%, respectively.
This honeyed elixir, brewed from a symphony of ingredients, exudes a rich, dulcet fragrance. This old remedy, passed down by the Kanamian elders, is said to hasten recovery when sipped by ailing children.

2010058.Name: Shroomfish Stew
2010058.Des:
Crafting yields products Lv.1, Lv.2, and Lv.3 at rates of 50%, 40%, and 10%, respectively.
Some mountain fungi shine as star ingredients, while others transform into an umami-rich broth, finished with flaky fish for sublime texture. This Culinary, with its intricate techniques and meticulously layered seasoning, has made the dish a rite of passage for aspiring chefs.

2010059.Name: Astelpot Feast
2010059.Des:
Crafting yields products Lv.1, Lv.2, and Lv.3 at rates of 50%, 40%, and 10%, respectively.
Asterleeds' Pot is a classic Asterleeds family dish, based on a simple fish stew... but which additional ingredients make it truly authentic remains a never-ending debate. Exclusively crafted for the Seabreeze Festival, this Asterleeds Pot celebrates the ocean's bounty in every spoonful-an ode to maritime diversity.

2010060.Name: Fruitocean Gelato
2010060.Des:
Crafting yields products Lv.1, Lv.2, and Lv.3 at rates of 50%, 40%, and 10%, respectively.
Don't let the quirky recipe or octopus-shaped appearance fool you-this dish delivers genuinely delightful flavors. Delicately textured fish sashimi is draped in a luxurious blend of fruit essence and honeyed butter. Let yourself be deliciously fooled-just take one bite.

2010061.Name: Seabreeze Festival Selection
2010061.Des:
Crafting yields products Lv.1, Lv.2, and Lv.3 at rates of 50%, 40%, and 10%, respectively.
Simmered with the most beloved ingredients of the Asterians, this dish embodies the soul of this Seaside city-presented in all its glory during days of celebration. Happy Seabreeze Festival!

2010062.Name: Buttermelt Roast
2010062.Des:
Crafting yields products Lv.1, Lv.2, and Lv.3 at rates of 50%, 40%, and 10%, respectively.
Once a single tenant begins cooking this in the communal kitchen, others swiftly follow. The wondrous scent of blooming herbs, garden-fresh vegetables, and sizzling pork in butter and cream seeps into every nook and cranny-awakening envy and hunger in all who catch its drift.

2010063.Name: Glazed Meat Relish
2010063.Des:
Crafting yields products Lv.1, Lv.2, and Lv.3 at rates of 50%, 40%, and 10%, respectively.
Made from the fattier cuts of prime meat, this glossy relish is prepared using a special technique to give it a gem-like, translucent sheen. A visual and flavorful indulgence.

2010064.Name: Kanamia Morsel
2010064.Des:
Crafting yields products Lv.1, Lv.2, and Lv.3 at rates of 50%, 40%, and 10%, respectively.
A curious snack of candied fruits dubbed "Kanamian Fruit Mash", though scarcely a single Kanamian has actually tasted it.

2010065.Name: Buttery Flyfish
2010065.Des:
Crafting yields products Lv.1, Lv.2, and Lv.3 at rates of 50%, 40%, and 10%, respectively.
A whole fish scored with precision, lavished with generous butter, and roasted to golden perfection. The masterful knife work transforms it mid-bake into wings-like splendor, earning its colloquial name "Butter Fly," though the name playfully misreads its true meaning.

2010066.Name: Bearcut Patty
2010066.Des:
Crafting yields products Lv.1, Lv.2, and Lv.3 at rates of 50%, 40%, and 10%, respectively.
Shaped like a cuddly bear. Probably someone's idea of a joke, but the flavor is no laughing matter.

2010067.Name: Spiceshroom Soup
2010067.Des:
Crafting yields products Lv.1, Lv.2, and Lv.3 at rates of 50%, 40%, and 10%, respectively.
Legend speaks of a mischievous child who, on a whim, replaced honey in a mushroom soup with Nine-Flavor Spice-unwittingly giving rise to a sublime new creation. The dish was later perfected by a master chef who delicately carved the fungi into hidden floral forms, causing the brew to shift its hue with the changing weather.

2010068.Name: Wanderfruit Juice
2010068.Des:
Crafting yields products Lv.1, Lv.2, and Lv.3 at rates of 50%, 40%, and 10%, respectively.
A specially blended fruit juice that's sweet and tangy, delivering a refreshing jolt to your taste buds. A perfect pre-meal pick-me-up.

2010069.Name: Mega Cheer-Up Treat
2010069.Des: Consumption grants a special effect: receive triple clear rewards the next time you complete any Chaotic Realm dungeon. This effect doesn't apply to assist rewards, Bane Lord loot, or clear counts, and remains subject to the weekly Reforge Stone acquisition limit in Chaotic Realm.

2010070.Name: Marinated Lamb Ribs
2010070.Des:
Marinate Fresh Lamb Ribs.
This process yields 6–7 products.

2010071.Name: Secret Flavor Marinated Ribs
2010071.Des:
Marinate Fresh Beast Ribs.
This process yields 6–7 products.

2010072.Name: Coarse Salt Cured Fish
2010072.Des:
Process the fish you caught into Coarse Salt Cured Fish.
This process yields 6–7 products.

2010073.Name: Mellow Delicacy Cured Fish
2010073.Des:
Process the fish you caught into Mellow Delicacy Cured Fish.
This process yields 6–7 products.

2010074.Name: Pan-Seared Meat Roll with Butter
2010074.Des:
Crafting yields products Lv.1 and Lv.2 at rates of 80% and 20%, respectively.
A specialty of the Bahamar Highlands. Meat rolls are seared with butter until fragrant and browned, then slow-roasted until cooked through. It is crispy outside and tender inside, bursting with rich aroma.

2010075.Name: Hearty Stewed Meat
2010075.Des:
Crafting yields products Lv.1 and Lv.2 at rates of 80% and 20%, respectively.
A specialty of the Bahamar Highlands. Fish and lamb ribs are slow-stewed together, the flavors melding into the broth.

2010076.Name: Fresh Soup
2010076.Des:
Crafting yields products Lv.1 and Lv.2 at rates of 80% and 20%, respectively.
A common homestyle dish on the highlands. Mustard is simmered with fish, producing a refreshing broth with a hint of spice.

2010077.Name: Honey Fish Delight
2010077.Des:
Crafting yields products Lv.1 and Lv.2 at rates of 80% and 20%, respectively.
A common homestyle dish on the highlands. Fish cooked with mustard and honey. The spice and sweetness intertwine, offering a refreshing taste.

2010078.Name: Citrus Fish Cake
2010078.Des:
Crafting yields products Lv.1 and Lv.2 at rates of 80% and 20%, respectively.
Fish mixed with citrus and flour, fried into golden, crispy cakes with a subtle fruit aroma. Cute in appearance, especially loved by kids.

2010079.Name: Fish-Shred Noodles
2010079.Des:
Crafting yields products Lv.1 and Lv.2 at rates of 80% and 20%, respectively.
Fish sliced into fine shreds and boiled with noodles, seasoned with citrus, fresh and slightly sweet on the finish. A popular highland dish.

2010080.Name: Spiced Lamb Rib Delight
2010080.Des:
Crafting yields products Lv.1 and Lv.2 at rates of 80% and 20%, respectively.
A specialty of the Bahamar Highlands. Simmered with mustard, the lamb ribs taste spicy and tender. The broth is also flavorful.

2010081.Name: Salt-Baked Lamb Ribs
2010081.Des:
Crafting yields products Lv.1 and Lv.2 at rates of 80% and 20%, respectively.
A specialty of the Bahamar Highlands. Seasoned with mustard and salt, the lamb ribs are baked until firm, juicy, and pleasantly aromatic.

2010082.Name: Citrus-Glazed Lamb Ribs
2010082.Des:
Crafting yields products Lv.1 and Lv.2 at rates of 80% and 20%, respectively.
A signature roast of the Bahamar Highlands. Lamb ribs glazed with butter and citrus juice, slow-roasted until golden and crisp outside, tender and juicy inside. Said to be a festival must-serve dish, best enjoyed on nights lit by fireworks.

2010083.Name: Citrus-Infused Lamb Pilaf
2010083.Des:
Crafting yields products Lv.1 and Lv.2 at rates of 80% and 20%, respectively.
Lamb ribs cooked together with rice. The sweet-tart citrius juice soaks into the grains, while the rich lamb aroma stacks on top, forming a hearty pot of layered flavor.

2010084.Name: Crispy Dried Fish
2010084.Des:
Crafting yields products Lv.1 and Lv.2 at rates of 80% and 20%, respectively.
Fish cut into strips, dried, then salted and roasted until crisp and aromatic. Every bite reminds you of the unique charm of the highlands.

2010085.Name: Savory Roast Lamb Ribs
2010085.Des:
Crafting yields products Lv.1 and Lv.2 at rates of 80% and 20%, respectively.
Lamb ribs salted and slow-roasted over fire, crispy and fragrant outside, firm and juicy inside. The savory highlights the rich flavor of highland lamb.

2010086.Name: Honey-Fresh Salad
2010086.Des:
Crafting yields products Lv.1 and Lv.2 at rates of 80% and 20%, respectively.
A common homestyle dish on the highlands. Thinly sliced mustard, chilled and tossed with butter and honey, crisp, lightly sweet, cooling and appetizing.

2010087.Name: Citrus Juice
2010087.Des:
Crafting yields products Lv.1 and Lv.2 at rates of 80% and 20%, respectively.
Citrus squeezed and mixed with water, sweetened with honey, refreshing, sweet-tart, with a unique bittersweet aftertaste.

2010088.Name: Golden Double-Meat Burger
2010088.Des:
Crafting yields products Lv.1 and Lv.2 at rates of 80% and 20%, respectively.
A popular fast food of the highlands. The crust is baked to a golden crisp, and the patties are fragrant. It's the adventurer's favorite supply. One bite restores a whole day's stamina.

2010089.Name: Twin-Fresh Grand Stew
2010089.Des:
Crafting yields products Lv.1 and Lv.2 at rates of 80% and 20%, respectively.
A specialty of the Bahamar Highlands. Fish and ribs simmered together with only salt for seasoning, producing a pure, rich broth with meaty flavor.

2010090.Name: Fiery Pan-Seared Fish
2010090.Des:
Crafting yields products Lv.1 and Lv.2 at rates of 80% and 20%, respectively.
A specialty of the Bahamar Highlands. Fish coated in Southwind pepper and salt, seared in butter until fragrant and browned, spicy and savory exploding together for a satisfying punch.

2010091.Name: Windy Seafood Chowder
2010091.Des:
Crafting yields products Lv.1 and Lv.2 at rates of 80% and 20%, respectively.
A specialty of the Bahamar Highlands. Fish cooked with Southwind pepper and enriched with butter, producing a spicy and creamy flavor.

2010092.Name: Simple Salted Fish Skewers
2010092.Des:
Crafting yields products Lv.1 and Lv.2 at rates of 80% and 20%, respectively.
A specialty of the Bahamar Highlands. Rainbeans and chunks of fish skewered and grilled with salt. The beans mild and fragrant, the fish tender and savory, simple yet pure.

2010093.Name: Mysterious Rainbean Paste
2010093.Des:
Crafting yields products Lv.1 and Lv.2 at rates of 80% and 20%, respectively.
Rainbeans mashed and mixed with fish, butter, and honey, a very mysterious highland specialty. Don't overthink it. Just taste it.

2010094.Name: Pepper Rib Strips
2010094.Des:
Crafting yields products Lv.1 and Lv.2 at rates of 80% and 20%, respectively.
A classic meat dish of the highlands. Ribs are brushed with butter, salted, coated with Southwind pepper, then grilled over open flame. The rich meat aroma and spicy heat intertwine, leaving an unforgettable punch. It's said to be the merchants' favorite late-night snack, perfect for driving away the highland cold and fatigue.

2010095.Name: Scorching Spicy Ribs
2010095.Des:
Crafting yields products Lv.1 and Lv.2 at rates of 80% and 20%, respectively.
A classic meat dish of the highlands. Ribs are marinated with Southwind pepper, then grilled until browned and fragrant, offering a spicy flavor and a firm texture.

2010096.Name: Lallipar Homestead Stew
2010096.Des:
Crafting yields products Lv.1 and Lv.2 at rates of 80% and 20%, respectively.
A homestyle dish from Lallipar. Ribs slow-stewed with Rainbeans. The meaty aroma soaks into the beans and creates a satisfying broth. Served to welcome travelers returning from long journeys. A single bowl brings back long-lost warmth.

2010097.Name: Highland Steamed Mix
2010097.Des:
Crafting yields products Lv.1 and Lv.2 at rates of 80% and 20%, respectively.
A common homestyle dish on the highlands. Rainbeans steamed together with ribs, seasoned with coarse salt to enhance the flavor. The meat aroma blends with the bean fragrance, simple yet lingering. It's the villagers' favorite festival dish, symbolizing the happiness of the whole family sharing a meal together.

2010098.Name: Sizzling Salted Fish Lv.2
2010098.Des:
Crafting yields products Lv.1 and Lv.2 at rates of 80% and 20%, respectively.
A signature grilled dish of the Bahamar Highlands. Fine cuts of fish are salted, brushed with butter, and grilled until the surface sizzles nonstop, releasing waves of savory aroma.

2010099.Name: Sizzling Grilled Ribs
2010099.Des:
Crafting yields products Lv.1 and Lv.2 at rates of 80% and 20%, respectively.
A bold and hearty specialty of the Bahamar Highlands. Under the glow of firelight, the ribs glisten with butter and sizzle loudly. The rich aroma rises into the night wind, urging you to dig in.

2010100.Name: Rich Flavor Condiment
2010100.Des:
Crafting yields products Lv.1 and Lv.2 at rates of 80% and 20%, respectively.
A special seasoning of the Bahamar Highlands. Seedless Southwind peppers are simmered slowly with butter, then lightly salted. The sauce is mellow and aromatic without any spiciness, safe for both children and the elderly.

2010101.Name: Honey Bean Roll
2010101.Des:
Crafting yields products Lv.1 and Lv.2 at rates of 80% and 20%, respectively.
A dessert of the Bahamar Highlands. The fresh fragrance of Rainbeans and the sweetness of honey melt together in a soft roll, like a sweet dream quietly unfolding in the afternoon sun.

2010102.Name: Tangy Fish
2010102.Des:
Crafting yields products Lv.1 and Lv.2 at rates of 80% and 20%, respectively.
Ranked by pilgrims as one of the top ten delicacies of the highlands.

2010103.Name: Honey Glazed Fish
2010103.Des:
Crafting yields products Lv.1 and Lv.2 at rates of 80% and 20%, respectively.
The sweetness of the honey softens the wildness of the mustard.

2010104.Name: Zesty Sour Fish Soup
2010104.Des:
Crafting yields products Lv.1 and Lv.2 at rates of 80% and 20%, respectively.
The fragrance of the bitter orange brings out the strong flavor of the yogurt.

2010105.Name: Steamed Fish with Orange Peel
2010105.Des:
Crafting yields products Lv.1 and Lv.2 at rates of 80% and 20%, respectively.
Perfectly recreates the savory taste of salted fish!

2010106.Name: Tangy Mutton Pot
2010106.Des:
Crafting yields products Lv.1 and Lv.2 at rates of 80% and 20%, respectively.

2010204.Des: Rich in nutrients but high in fat, so don't overconsume it.

2030237.Name: Isotopic Alloy Ingot
2030237.Des: While processing ores infused with Xeno Engram, artisans discovered two revolutionary reactions. One such reaction, "Isotopic," affirms the base material. It "recognizes" and "strengthens" the material's very essence, forging a reshaped alloy that is not only stronger but also possesses a degree of shape memory.

2030240.Name: Heterotopic Alloy Ingot
2030240.Des: In contrast to the "Isotopic" reaction, the "Heterotopic" reaction "negates" and "distorts" the base material's essence. It reshapes the material into a bizarre, unstable alloy. The creation of Heterotopic Alloy, akin to an artisan giving form to ever-shifting lightning, is enough to revolutionize existing crafting structures.
